title: Create corporate website for Gowtham Groups

requirements.text: Create a hero section with company branding, tagline, and prominent call-to-action button that welcomes visitors to Gowtham Groups

quotes: create a similar website like this https://www.danielmerchandising.co.in/ for gowtham groups

acceptanceCriteria: Hero section displays company name 'Gowtham Groups'
Includes tagline or mission statement
Contains prominent CTA button
Uses full-width layout with background image or color

requirements.text: Implement an About Us section describing Gowtham Groups' company overview, mission, vision, and core values

quotes: create a similar website like this https://www.danielmerchandising.co.in/ for gowtham groups

acceptanceCriteria: Section includes company description
Displays mission and vision statements
Lists core values or company principles
Uses professional layout with proper spacing

requirements.text: Create a Services/Products section showcasing Gowtham Groups' business offerings with cards or tiles for each service category

quotes: create a similar website like this https://www.danielmerchandising.co.in/ for gowtham groups

acceptanceCriteria: Displays multiple service/product categories
Each category has icon or image, title, and brief description
Uses grid or card-based layout
Responsive design for mobile and desktop

requirements.text: Build a Contact section with company contact information including address, phone, email, and a contact form for inquiries

quotes: create a similar website like this https://www.danielmerchandising.co.in/ for gowtham groups

acceptanceCriteria: Displays company contact details (address, phone, email)
Includes working contact form with name, email, subject, and message fields
Form validates required fields before submission
Backend stores contact form submissions
User receives confirmation after successful submission

requirements.text: Create a responsive navigation header with logo and menu items linking to different sections (Home, About, Services, Contact)

quotes: create a similar website like this https://www.danielmerchandising.co.in/ for gowtham groups

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar is fixed or sticky at top
Includes Gowtham Groups logo/branding
Menu items navigate to corresponding sections
Mobile-responsive with hamburger menu on small screens
Active section is highlighted in navigation

requirements.text: Implement a footer section with company information, quick links, social media icons, and copyright notice

quotes: create a similar website like this https://www.danielmerchandising.co.in/ for gowtham groups

acceptanceCriteria: Footer contains company tagline or brief description
Includes quick links to main sections
Displays social media icons (LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, etc.)
Shows copyright notice with current year
Uses professional multi-column layout

requirements.text: Design the website with a professional, corporate visual theme using a sophisticated color palette with elegant typography and modern layout patterns suitable for a business group
acceptanceCriteria: Uses professional color scheme (avoid blue and purple unless specifically corporate brand colors)
Typography is clean and readable with proper hierarchy
Layout follows modern corporate design patterns
Consistent spacing and visual rhythm throughout
Design conveys trust, professionalism, and stability

constraints: Must follow single-actor Motoko backend architecture
Frontend must use React with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and React Query
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui)
nonGoals: User authentication or member login system
Real-time chat or customer support features

required: Corporate hero background image with modern business aesthetic (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Professional company logo for Gowtham Groups with transparent background (gowtham-logo.dim_400x200.png)
Service icon for manufacturing or production operations (service-manufacturing.dim_256x256.png)
Service icon for logistics or distribution (service-logistics.dim_256x256.png)
Service icon for retail or merchandising (service-retail.dim_256x256.png)
About section background with subtle corporate pattern (about-bg.dim_1200x800.png)
